src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add 'scp' as a new supported endpoint type to the EndpointType enum.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: EndpointType { dropbox, gdrive, sftp, ftp, box, s3, gftp, http, vfs, scp }

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Remove import for the deprecated Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka client annotation.
Add import for Spring's scheduling annotation support.
Activate the Spring Cloud Discovery Client annotation on the main application class.
Activate Spring's scheduling support on the main application class.
Refactor BatchConfig to remove complex legacy bean definitions and rely on Spring Boot's auto-configuration for JobRepository, while explicitly defining a synchronous JobLauncher.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Replaced commented-out complex JobRepository and CustomReader beans with a simple JobLauncher bean using SyncTaskExecutor and a jobIds Set bean.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add import for java.time.Duration to support new throughput calculation logic.
Remove URI scheme constants and other fields that are no longer used in the refactored codebase.
Rename SOURCE_URI constant to SOURCE_HOST to better reflect its usage as a host identifier.
Rename DEST_URI constant to DEST_HOST to better reflect its usage as a host identifier.
Add SOURCE_PORT constant for specifying source port in connections.
Add DEST_PORT constant for specifying destination port in connections.
Add FILE_COUNT constant for tracking file counts.
Add SOURCE_CREDENTIAL_TYPE constant for specifying source credential types.
Add DEST_CREDENTIAL_TYPE constant for specifying destination credential types.
Correct FIVE_MB constant to use precise byte calculation (5 * 1024 * 1024) instead of approximate value.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
- public static final int FIVE_MB = 5000000;
+ public static final int FIVE_MB = 5 * 1024 * 1024;

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Remove TRANSFER_SLICE_SIZE constant as it is no longer used.
Add TWENTY_MB constant for 20MB size definition.
Add GOOGLE_DRIVE_MIN_BYTES constant for Google Drive minimum byte threshold.
Add HTTP header and range constants for partial content requests.
Add SCP command string constants for remote file operations.
Add job and file size metric constants.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
+ public static final String JOB_SIZE = "jobSize";
+ public static final String FILE_SIZE_AVG = "fileSizeAvg";

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add HTTP compression and encoding constants.
Add concurrency and parallelism configuration constants.
Add application and thread pool naming constants.
Add computeThroughput method to calculate data transfer speed in megabits per second.
Replace Gson with Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON deserialization to align with Spring Boot ecosystem standards.
Switch from field-based @Autowired injection to constructor-based injection for better testability and immutability.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: public RabbitMQConsumer(VfsExpander vfsExpander, Queue userQueue, ...) { this.vfsExpander = vfsExpander; ... }

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add support for expanding VFS directory paths into file lists before processing transfer jobs.
Implement dynamic thread pool optimization based on concurrency and parallelism parameters received via RabbitMQ.
Externalize RabbitMQ queue configuration by injecting a Queue bean instead of using a hardcoded property placeholder.
Replace System.out.println and stack traces with structured SLF4J logging for better observability.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: logger.info("Message recv: {}", jsonStr); ... logger.debug("Failed to parse jsonStr: {} to TransferJobRequest.java", jsonStr);

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Track active job IDs by storing them in a Set after job execution starts.
Replace direct database CRUD service injection with a new VFS expander service to handle directory expansion logic.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Removed `CrudService crudService` field and added `VfsExpander vfsExpander` field.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Rename the job launcher field from asyncJobLauncher to jobLauncher to reflect standard naming or removal of explicit async annotation reliance.
Introduce constructor injection for a Set of job IDs to track active jobs, moving away from field-only initialization.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added `Set<Long> jobIds` field and a constructor `public TransferController(Set<Long> jobIds)`.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add logic to expand VFS directory paths into a list of entity info before processing the transfer request.
Remove sensitive and verbose debug logging statements that were likely left in during development.
Modify the job submission process to capture the JobExecution object and store its ID in the tracked set.
Update the API response to return the actual JobExecution ID instead of the request's job ID.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Changed response body to use `jobExecution.getJobId()` instead of `request.getJobId()`.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace PriorityQueue with ConcurrentLinkedQueue to support concurrent access patterns in the data chunk storage.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: private Queue<DataChunk> dataChunkPriorityQueue; ... this.dataChunkPriorityQueue = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<DataChunk>();

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Calculate SHA-256 hash of the condensed data stream to provide integrity verification.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: MessageDigest md = MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-256"); ... md.update(currentChunk.getData()); ... String output = String.format("%032X", new BigInteger(1, md.digest()));

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add SLF4J logging to track individual chunk processing and final hash output.
Sort data chunks using DataChunkComparator before condensing them into a single stream to ensure correct order.
Add a public clear method to allow external clearing of the data chunk queue.
Update Lombok annotations to use SneakyThrows for exception handling in the condense method.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: import lombok.SneakyThrows; ... @SneakyThrows public InputStream condenseListToOneStream(long size){

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Swap the data types of chunkIdx and startPosition fields to correct their semantic representation.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Changed 'long chunkIdx' to 'int chunkIdx' and 'int startPosition' to 'long startPosition'.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Exclude the data byte array from the generated toString method to prevent verbose or sensitive output.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added '@ToString.Exclude' annotation to the 'byte[] data' field.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add a chunkSize field to the EntityInfo model to support chunked data handling.
Change the type of the 'size' field from long to int.
Add a new boolean field 'isLastChunk' to the model.
Rename javax.persistence imports to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements for Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Remove the @Builder annotation to simplify object construction or resolve conflicts with other annotations.
Add @NoArgsConstructor to ensure the class can be instantiated without arguments, likely for JSON deserialization.
Remove the jobId field from the request model, implying it is no longer part of the input contract.
Remove the priority field from the request model.
Remove the chunkSize field from the request model.
Add connectionBufferSize field to the request model to configure buffer sizes.
Add credId field to the Destination inner class to reference credentials by ID.
Replace the complex EntityInfo parentInfo field with a simple String fileDestinationPath in Destination.
Add credId field to the Source inner class to reference credentials by ID.
Replace the complex EntityInfo parentInfo field with a simple String fileSourcePath in Source.
